title: Cuneiform Tablet #0064: Middle Assyrian Royal Inscription
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Royal Inscription document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records royal inscription matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
